manager.description: Full access to properties, units, tenants, and dashboards.

landlord.description: Owner of the property. Can view payments and property performance.

tenant.description: Occupant of Unit A1. Can view lease and submit maintenance requests.

free_manager.description: Manager on the FREE plan. Limited to 1 property, 1 owner, etc.

enterprise_manager.description: Manager on the ENTERPRISE plan. Unlimited access to everything.
